title: Angshuman MBA
overview: Friends often mock ‘Angshuman’ about the family business. So he will do something new with a master’s degree in commerce. He also started a break-up company accordingly! This organization helps to end the long-running conflict between boyfriend and girlfriend or husband and wife. That is, it causes separation!
